chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SU Crl. Misc. Application No.S-151 of 2019. Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 01.04.2019 The applicant in person Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, DPG for the State.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The applicant by way of instant Crimina Application u/s 491 Cr.P.C has sought for production of hi Maria to be set free after recording of her statement, as s has been confined illegally by the private respondent. 2. Mst. Maria the alleged detainee has put through S.H.O PS A-Section Ghtoki. It is stated by being sui juris has contracted marriage with the priv of her own accord and she is under no wrongful confinem Her statement to that effect has also been recorded by S.H. Ghotki, it is brought on record. 3. The circumstances detailed above sugge Maria is under no wrongful confinement to be set free by th of instant application, it is dismissed accordingly.
